description:
Summer/Winter Operating Area: The Bahamas

CHARTER IN THE BAHAMAS ABOARD M/Y PRIVILEGE

M/Y PRIVILEGE distinguishes itself with its unmatched utilization of onboard space and innovative design. Crafted by WHS Marine, this bespoke vessel offers owners a seamless luxury cruising experience. Every detail of PRIVILEGE’s layout is meticulously crafted to maximize space and seamlessly blend the outdoor experience into the interior.

amenities.label: Private jacuzzi tub in the owner's ensuite

crew.name: OLEG KOVALCHUK
crew.bio:
American

Captain Oleg Kovalchuk is a seasoned mariner and has experience navigating the waters of the US East Coast, Bahamas, and Caribbean. With a passion for watersports, travel, and outdoor activities, he thrives on the thrill of adventure and the freedom of exploration. 

Describing himself as creative, logical, adventurous, and easygoing, Captain Oleg brings a unique perspective to his role as a yacht captain. His creative flair infuses every aspect of his work, from crafting Itineraries to problem-solving on the fly. Yet, he balances this creativity with a logical approach, ensuring that safety and efficiency remain top priorities at all times. 

Captain Oleg's easygoing demeanor fosters a welcoming atmosphere aboard the "PRIVILEGE," where guests feel comfortable and at ease. Whether he's charting a course through unfamiliar waters or engaging guests in thrilling watersports activities, Captain Oleg's Infectious enthusiasm and adaptable nature ensure that every voyage is both exhilarating and enjoyable.

crew.name: CHRISTIAN FERRARA
crew.bio:
American

Meet Christian, an adept first mate whose love for yachting is matched only by his commitment to exceptional service. Raised in the quaint community of Lordship, Connecticut, just a stone's throw from the idyllic Long Island Sound, Christian's journey into yachting commenced in 2021. Following stints in various hospitality roles, he discovered his passion for the sea and the thrill of exploring new destinations. Christian's dedication to guest satisfaction is palpable, always ready to assist and share his enthusiasm for yachting. With a keen eye for detail and a knack for problem-solving, Christian ensures smooth sailing for every guest, prioritizing safety above all else.

crew.name: JOVANA JOVANOVIC
crew.bio:
Serbian

Chef Jovana's culinary journey began in Serbia, where she cultivated her passion for cooking before embarking on a voyage across Europe to refine her skills. Specializing in Mediterranean cuisine and renowned for her expertise in vegan delicacies, Chef Jovana has spent the past five years enchanting palates aboard private yachts in Miami. Her culinary adventures extend beyond Miami's shores, as she frequently travels to the Bahamas and other Caribbean islands. With the honor of cooking for distinguished figures, including the Prince of Morocco, Chef Jovana is driven by a profound love for her craft, finding fulfillment in sharing her culinary expertise with others.

crew.name: LARA CABELLO
crew.bio:
Italian

lara brings a wealth of hospitality experience to her role aboard "PRIVILEGE." Armed with a degree in tourism and hotel management, she embarked on her yachting career in 2020, quickly establishing herself as a valuable asset to any charter. With extensive experience in childcare and as a kid group leader, lara is adept at creating a welcoming and safe environment for young guests, ensuring that their needs are met with care and attention. 

lara's dedication to providing five-star service is evident in her commitment to solving any query that arises during the charter. Whether it's arranging a special request or addressing a guest's concern, she approaches each situation with professionalism and a can-do attitude. Her love for challenges drives her to continuously exceed expectations, leaving guests impressed and satisfied.
